daily.today_energy: Mercury's doing its thing and you're basically a human magnet for interesting conversations. Channel that restless vibe into something creative—your ideas are actually hitting different today.
daily.love: If you're coupled up, your person might need some extra reassurance that you're still here. Single? Someone's been thinking about you more than you realize. Pay attention to subtle signals.
daily.career: This is lowkey your moment to speak up in meetings. Your perspective matters way more than you think. Don't play small just because you're feeling reflective.
daily.health: Your nervous system's a bit overstimulated, so carve out some quiet time tonight. A walk, journaling, or literally just sitting in silence will reset things. Your body's asking for it.

weekly.overview: This week's energy is asking you to slow down and get curious about what you actually want. Mercury's moving in your favor, so trust those random epiphanies. Something unexpected might shift your perspective by Thursday.
weekly.love: If you're single, someone's been lowkey thinking about you. If coupled up, this is a good week to have that conversation you've been avoiding. Vulnerability hits different when you're honest about your needs.
weekly.career: Your ideas are landing better than usual right now. Don't sleep on that project or pitch you've been hesitant about—timing's weirdly perfect. Just remember that collaboration beats going solo this week.
weekly.health: Your nervous system's asking for gentleness. Maybe swap high-intensity workouts for walks or yoga. Sleep's gonna be important, so actually honor your bedtime. Your body's trying to tell you something.
